title: "GitHub & Quarto Operation Check"
format: gfm
engine: jupyterMarkdown rendering checkThis section confirms that standard Markdown elements are rendered correctly on GitHub.[x] Task list itemBold text and italic textLink to GitHubMathematical equations (MathJax)GitHub's Markdown viewer supports LaTeX-style equations. We use this to verify the math rendering engine.$$\frac{d}{dx} \left( \int_{a}^{x} f(t) dt \right) = f(x)$$Python code executionThis chunk verifies that the Python environment is correctly set up during the GitHub Actions execution.import sys
import platform

print(f"Python Version: {sys.version}")
print(f"Platform: {platform.platform()}")
print("Status: Execution Successful")
Diagrams (Mermaid)The following diagram checks the Mermaid integration within the Quarto document.graph LR
    A[Push to GitHub] --> B(GitHub Actions)
    B --> C{Render Quarto}
    C --> D[Success]
